home.title: Find Property in Vientiane
home.subtitle: Discover a more curated way to buy, rent, and showcase standout property across Vientiane with a brokerage built for premium local and international clients.
home.storyTitle: A sharper way to discover where Vientiane is moving next.
home.storyBody: We position every listing with market context, neighborhood insight, and presentation that helps serious buyers move faster. From riverside apartments to development land, the main page should feel as ambitious as the homes it represents.
home.storyPanelQuote: We match discerning buyers, relocation clients, and investors with homes that feel exceptional before the first viewing even happens.
home.promoTitle: Put your property in front of serious buyers first.
home.promoBody: This premium banner is reserved for homeowners who want an elevated launch on the PM Real Estate homepage, with stronger visibility, richer presentation, and a direct path to inquiries.
home.typeLandDesc: Plots and development land in prime locations
home.typeRentalDesc: Furnished apartments and houses for rent

about.title: About PM Real Estate
about.subtitle: Vientiane's trusted property agency
about.introP1: PM Real Estate has been connecting buyers, sellers, and tenants with the right properties in Vientiane since 2015. We specialise in residential sales, commercial land, and long-term rentals across all major districts of the Lao capital.
about.introP2: Our bilingual team — fluent in Lao, English, and Mandarin — guides international clients and local families through every step of the property journey, from first viewing to title deed transfer.
about.why1Desc: Deep knowledge of every Vientiane neighbourhood, pricing trends, and land title regulations.
about.why2Desc: Clear fees, honest valuations, and no hidden costs. We work for you, not the commission.
about.why3Desc: Fluent support in Lao, English, and Mandarin throughout the entire process.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: Have a question or want to arrange a viewing? Reach out and our team will be in touch within one business day.
contact.officeAddress:
